calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Aug-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Mark D. Byrne, Esq. of Triano & Byrne, Tel. 415.371.8000, for defendant, and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The moving party provided the Court with copies of the moving papers before the hearing. The matter was discussed. For good cause, the Court granted ATTY. MARK D. BYRNE'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT CHARLES ZARGANIS. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
